_provenance: Real, cited constants used by market_context() and the commercial upside model. Figures from public market reports (2025-2026). Sources listed per field.

sustainable_fashion_market.source: Roots Analysis, Sustainable Fashion Market report (2026)

willingness_to_pay.basis: Premium consumers in North America/Europe will pay for garments with recognised certifications (GOTS, Fair Trade, Bluesign)
willingness_to_pay.source: McKinsey/Business of Fashion, cited in DataIntelo (2025)
willingness_to_pay.nuance: Stated willingness-to-pay is softening under inflation; actual behaviour weights price/convenience (McKinsey State of Fashion).
